title: Gitover State
description: Persisted application state saved to gitover.state.yaml (CWD-walk or ~/.config/gitover/state.yaml fallback). Written automatically on exit; hand-editing is supported.

sections.description: Ordered list of repository sections. sections[0] is always the default (unnamed) section; sections[1..] are named sections in case-insensitive alphabetical order.

show_file_status.description: Whether the Status Details pane was open on last exit.

show_log.description: Whether the Output Log pane was open on last exit.

show_history.description: Whether the Git History pane was open on last exit.

show_details.description: Whether the Details (diff/commit) pane was open on last exit.

name.description: Section name. Omit (or set to null) for the default (unnamed) section. Named sections are shown with a title row in the Repositories pane.

repos.description: Repository paths belonging to this section. Paths relative to the state file's directory are resolved against that directory; absolute paths are used as-is. On save, paths under the state file's directory are stored as relative paths.

collapsed.description: Collapsed state of this section in the Repositories pane. Only meaningful for named sections; the default section is never collapsed. Omitted from the file when false.
